parameters.content:
## 🎙️ Retell Inventory Query Tool

**Full filter set Jessica can pass:**
- model        → "GLC 300", "AMG GT", "CLA"
- body_style   → "SUV", "Sedan", "Coupe", "Convertible"
- trim         → "AMG GT 63 S", "4MATIC+"
- color        → "black", "white", "silver"
- fuel_type    → "Gasoline", "Hybrid", "Electric"
- condition    → "New" or "Used"
- min_price    → minimum MSRP (number)
- max_price    → maximum MSRP (number)
- min_year     → e.g. 2024
- max_year     → e.g. 2026
- max_mileage  → for used vehicles (number)

**Webhook URL (after activation):**
https://orayalabsai.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/inventory-query

**REPLACE before activating:**
- REPLACE_SUPABASE_PROJECT_URL
- REPLACE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY (both occurrences in Query Supabase node)

changes: Fixed webhook URL in sticky note — now points to orayalabsai.app.n8n.cloud (was hanfluxai2026)
Added Guard Supabase Response node — catches Supabase error objects before Format step, returns graceful voice fallback
Format Voice Response updated to short-circuit cleanly on upstream error
Query limit raised from 5 to 10 — Format step still caps voice output at top 5 but fetches more for better ranking
top_matches now includes mileage field for full context
mileage filter (max_mileage → mileage=lte.X) already present — now works because Sync workflow stores mileage column
